title: Aim & components
body:
Cooperative game: defeat 12 castle enemies (4 Jacks, 4 Queens, 4 Kings). Win by defeating the last King. Lose if a player cannot pay damage or cannot play or yield on their turn.

Deck mapping:
- Jacks, Queens, Kings = castle enemies
- 2-10 = number cards
- Aces = animal companions
- Jokers = jesters

title: Setup
body:
1. Castle deck: shuffle 4 Kings face-down, 4 Queens on top, 4 Jacks on top. Flip top Jack as first enemy.
2. Tavern: shuffle 2-10, 4 Aces, and jesters (count by players). Shared discard pile.
3. Deal each player up to max hand size.
4. First player: house rule or random online.

Players | Jesters in tavern | Max hand
1 | 0 | 8
2 | 0 | 7
3 | 1 | 6
4 | 2 | 5

Enemy attack / health: Jack 10/20, Queen 15/30, King 20/40.

title: Step 1 — Play or yield
body:
Play from hand; number = attack value. Yield skips steps 2-3 and goes to step 4. You cannot yield if every other player yielded on their last turn.

Special plays:
- Ace: alone or with one other non-jester card (+1 attack). Not a rank combo.
- Combo: 2-4 same rank numbers, total <= 10, no aces.
- Jester: alone; 0 attack; cancels enemy immunity; skip steps 3-4; you choose who plays next.
- Defeated enemy in hand: Jack 10, Queen 15, King 20 for attack or discard defense.

title: Step 2 — Suit powers
body:
Hearts: shuffle discard, bury cards equal to attack under tavern (no peek), return rest to discard.

Diamonds: you draw, then clockwise one card each until attack value reached. Skip players at max hand.

Clubs: damage doubled in step 3.

Spades: in step 4, reduce enemy attack by this play's value (cumulative until enemy defeated).

Hearts before diamonds if both apply. Enemy is immune to powers of its own suit (damage still counts). Jester removes immunity.

title: Step 3 — Damage
body:
Deal damage = attack (x2 if clubs applied). Damage is cumulative vs current enemy.

If total >= enemy health: enemy defeated. Exact damage puts enemy face-down on top of tavern; otherwise to discard. Played cards to discard. Flip next castle card. Player who defeated enemy skips step 4 and starts step 1 vs new enemy.

title: Step 4 — Suffer damage
body:
If enemy not defeated: discard cards totaling at least enemy attack minus cumulative spade shield. Ace = 1, jester = 0 when discarding.

Cannot pay = that player dies and everyone loses. Next player clockwise begins step 1.

title: Communication & end
body:
Forbidden: revealing or suggesting hand contents. Allowed: public info (hand size, tavern count).

After jester until next turn: vague hints about who should go next are OK; still no hand contents.

Win: last King defeated. Lose: cannot pay damage, or on your turn cannot play or yield.

title: Solo mode
body:
0 jesters in tavern; 2 jesters set aside. Use a jester power: discard hand, refill to 8 (not a diamond draw). Usable at step 1 or before damage in step 4. Max 2 uses.

Victory tiers: 0 jesters used = Gold, 1 = Silver, 2 = Bronze.
